World Book Day 2026  Waari Book Café, Kothrud Pune Celebrates the Magic of Reading.

📚 Happy World Book Day from Waari Book Café! 📚

Today, April 23, the world celebrates the one thing that 
has always made us more human  the book. 🌍

At Waari, every day is World Book Day.
But today we celebrate a little louder. ☕✨

Come in and:
📖 Find your next favourite book
☕ Sip our signature coffee
💼 Work from our coworking space
🎲 Challenge someone to a board game
💑 Share a perfect afternoon with someone you love

Because the best story you'll ever read
might be the one that starts at Waari today. 🖤

📍 Kothrud, Pune
🕘 Open 9AM – 5AM, Every Single Day
🎉 Events & Private Bookings: Up to 101 Guests
